message:
fix: blueprint cluster name overlap + show project names on completed nodes (#5364)

Two Flight Plan Blueprint polish fixes:

1. Truncate cluster names longer than 18 chars to prevent overlap
   with DISK/PVC stat blocks in the top-right of each cluster zone.

2. Show project name labels on completed nodes (not just on hover).
   Completed deployments now always display their project name above
   the node, making the blueprint self-documenting without hovering.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
